accurate.why: The description of the D.C. Revised Criminal Code Act's contents (definitions, sentencing, jury trial rights) is accurate real-world context supported by public record.

no_hallucinations.why: The summary accurately describes what the nullified D.C. act contained based on public legislative record.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution nullifies the D.C. Revised Criminal Code Act of 2022.

changes_to_existing_law.why: A disapproval resolution does not amend federal law.

effective_dates.why: No effective dates or deadlines are specified in the resolution text itself.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the essential effect — nullification of the D.C. act — and adds valuable context about the act's contents.

correct_entities.why: D.C. Council and the D.C. Revised Criminal Code Act of 2022 correctly named.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
